description: OIDC authentication: device code flow, token caching, credential management (auth.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: _global_auth_dir
key_interfaces.description: Return global zchat directory for auth storage (~/.zchat/)

key_interfaces.name: get_username
key_interfaces.description: Return globally configured username from auth.json (bypasses token expiry)

key_interfaces.name: save_token
key_interfaces.description: Save token data to auth.json with restricted permissions (0600)

key_interfaces.name: load_cached_token
key_interfaces.description: Load cached token if exists and not expired, returns None otherwise

key_interfaces.name: discover_oidc_endpoints
key_interfaces.description: Fetch OIDC discovery document from issuer, tries standard + /oidc/ prefix

key_interfaces.name: device_code_flow
key_interfaces.description: Run full OIDC device code flow: get device code, poll for token, fetch userinfo

key_interfaces.name: refresh_token_if_needed
key_interfaces.description: Refresh access token using refresh_token, save updated data

key_interfaces.name: get_credentials
key_interfaces.description: Return (username, access_token) if valid credentials exist, auto-refresh if expired

key_interfaces.name: _sanitize_irc_nick
key_interfaces.description: Sanitize string into valid IRC nick per RFC 2812

key_interfaces.name: _extract_username
key_interfaces.description: Extract username from OIDC userinfo with fallback chain: username -> preferred_username -> email -> sub

user_flows.name: OIDC device code login
steps: POST device_authorization_endpoint to get device code
return dict with access_token, refresh_token, username, expires_at

user_flows.name: get credentials with auto-refresh
steps: if expired, read stored auth.json for refresh_token + token_endpoint
